skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: A loop execution engine for orchestrating skill groups. It sequentially executes configured skills and runs a gate check after each iteration until it passes or hits the max iterations, enabling a multi-skill PDCA loop.
skills.descriptionZh: 用于编排技能组的循环执行引擎。它按顺序执行配置的技能，并在每次迭代后运行门控检查，直到通过或达到最大迭代次数，实现多技能的PDCA循环。

skills.name: skill-prompt-convert
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Bidirectionally converts between Skill (SKILL.md) and Prompt formats without losing core information. It automatically adapts the structure and specifications for both formats.
skills.descriptionZh: 在Skill（SKILL.md）与Prompt（聊天框指令）两种格式之间进行双向转换。确保核心信息零丢失，并自动适配两种格式的结构与规范。

skills.name: skill-publisher
skills.author: joeseesun
skills.description: A tool to publish Claude Code Skills to GitHub with one click, automating validation, file completion, repository creation, pushing, and installation verification.
skills.descriptionZh: 一键将 Claude Code Skill 发布到 GitHub，自动完成验证、补全文件、创建仓库、推送并验证可安装的全流程。

skills.name: sprint-pipeline-v2
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: A 7-stage sprint pipeline orchestrator with intra-stage parallel execution. It uses a Conductor to route tasks through think, plan, design, build, review, test, ship, and reflect stages.
skills.descriptionZh: 一个7阶段冲刺流水线编排工具，支持阶段内并行执行。通过Conductor调度，将任务路由至思考、计划、设计、构建、审查、测试、发布和反思阶段。

skills.name: standup-post
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: Generates a daily standup update from git activity, task plans, and pipeline status, aggregating multiple sources into a formatted report.
skills.descriptionZh: 从Git活动、任务计划和流水线状态生成每日站会更新，汇总多个数据源并输出格式化的报告。

skills.name: start
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: First-time onboarding tool that detects project state, assesses the user's game development progress, and guides them to the appropriate workflow.
skills.descriptionZh: 首次引导工具，通过检测项目状态并询问用户的游戏开发进度，为其推荐并规划合适的后续工作流。

skills.name: strategic-compact
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: Suggests manual context compaction at logical intervals in workflows to prevent context loss from arbitrary auto-compaction. It tracks tool calls and reminds users to compact during task phase transitions.
skills.descriptionZh: 提供在工作流的逻辑节点手动压缩上下文的建议，以避免自动压缩导致的关键信息丢失。通过监控工具调用次数，在任务阶段转换时提醒用户进行上下文清理。

skills.name: supermemory
skills.author: supermemoryai
skills.description: Provides persistent user memory across sessions with intelligent auto-forgetting and contradiction handling. Used to track user facts, preferences, and decisions while avoiding sensitive data storage.
skills.descriptionZh: 提供跨会话的持久化用户记忆功能，支持智能自动遗忘和矛盾处理。用于跟踪用户事实、偏好和决策，同时避免存储敏感数据。

skills.name: summarize
skills.author: az9713
skills.description: Summarizes URLs, PDFs, documents, and videos into concise text with configurable detail levels. Preserves the author's conclusion and includes source attribution.
skills.descriptionZh: 将URL、PDF、文档和视频总结为简明的文本，支持多种详细程度配置。在总结时会保留原作者的结论并包含来源出处。

skills.name: swarm-ops
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: Operates the Agent Matrix Swarm Intelligence system, supporting status checks, health monitoring, agent discovery, task allocation, and circuit breaking.
skills.descriptionZh: 用于操作和管理智能体矩阵蜂群系统，支持查看状态、健康检查、发现智能体、分配任务及熔断控制。

skills.name: tavily-search
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: Perform secure web searches and URL content extraction using the Tavily API. Useful for fast web research, gathering sourced results, and extracting text from specific URLs.
skills.descriptionZh: 使用 Tavily API 进行安全的网络搜索和 URL 内容提取。适用于快速网络研究、收集带来源的结果以及从特定 URL 提取文本。

skills.name: team-combat
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Orchestrates a combat development team including designers, programmers, technical artists, sound designers, and QA testers to design, implement, and validate combat features end-to-end. Manages subagents through a structured pipeline with user decision points.
skills.descriptionZh: 协调战斗开发团队（包括游戏设计师、程序员、技术美术、音效设计师和QA测试员），端到端地设计、实现和验证游戏战斗功能。通过结构化的流水线管理子智能体，并在每个阶段向用户请求决策。

skills.name: team-audio
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Orchestrates a team of subagents including an audio director, sound designer, technical artist, and gameplay programmer. It manages the full audio pipeline from sonic identity design to technical implementation and code integration.
skills.descriptionZh: 协调由音频总监、声音设计师、技术美术和游戏程序员组成的音频团队子代理。覆盖从音频方向设计、音效规格制定到技术实现和代码集成的完整音频工作流。

skills.name: team-narrative
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Orchestrates a narrative team including a narrative director, writer, world-builder, and level designer to create cohesive story content, world lore, and narrative-driven level design through a structured pipeline.
skills.descriptionZh: 协调叙事团队（包括叙事总监、编剧、世界观构建师和关卡设计师），通过结构化的工作流创建连贯的故事内容、世界观设定和叙事驱动的关卡设计。

skills.name: team-polish
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Orchestrates a polish team including performance analysts, technical artists, sound designers, and QA testers to optimize, polish, and harden a feature for release quality.
skills.descriptionZh: 协调打磨团队（包括性能分析师、技术美术、音效设计师和QA测试员），通过结构化流程对功能或区域进行优化、打磨和加固，以达到发布质量。

skills.name: team-level
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Orchestrates a multi-disciplinary team of subagents to design a complete game level or area, delegating tasks across narrative, layout, systems, art, and QA to compile a comprehensive level design document.
skills.descriptionZh: 协调由叙事、世界观、关卡、系统、美术和QA等子代理组成的设计团队，完成完整的游戏区域或关卡创建，并最终生成关卡设计文档。

skills.name: tech-debt
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: Used for auditing technical debt, planning repayment sprints, and tracking debt accumulation. Supports scanning the codebase for debt indicators, adding entries, prioritizing by impact, and generating status reports.
skills.descriptionZh: 用于审计技术债务、规划重构冲刺或跟踪债务积累。支持扫描代码库中的债务指标、手动添加记录、按影响优先级排序以及生成债务状态报告。

skills.name: team-ui
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Orchestrates a UI team consisting of a UX designer, UI programmer, and art director to design, implement, and polish user interface features. It manages a structured pipeline from wireframing and visual design to implementation and review.
skills.descriptionZh: 协调用户体验设计师、UI程序员和艺术总监，完成从线框图到最终成品的UI功能设计与实现。通过结构化流程管理UX设计、视觉设计、代码实现及审查优化。

skills.name: test-runner
skills.author: firstloophq
skills.description: Provides a unified test execution interface that auto-detects and runs tests across multiple frameworks like Jest, PyTest, and Mocha. Useful for running tests, analyzing failures, and CI debugging.
skills.descriptionZh: 提供统一的测试执行接口，支持自动检测并运行多种框架（如Jest、PyTest、Mocha等）的测试。适用于运行测试、分析测试失败原因和CI调试。

skills.name: verification-loop
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: A comprehensive verification system for Claude Code sessions, featuring phases for build, type checking, linting, testing, security scanning, and diff review.
skills.descriptionZh: 为Claude Code会话提供全面的代码验证系统，包含构建、类型检查、代码检查、测试、安全扫描和差异审查等阶段。

skills.name: vphone-cli
skills.author: Lakr233
skills.description: A CLI tool to boot virtual iPhones on Apple Silicon Macs using Apple's native Virtualization.framework. It supports SSH/VNC access and firmware flashing, designed for iOS security research and reverse engineering.
skills.descriptionZh: 在Apple Silicon Mac上使用原生Virtualization.framework启动虚拟iPhone的命令行工具。支持SSH/VNC访问和固件刷写，主要用于iOS安全研究和逆向工程。

skills.name: web-multi-search
skills.author: soxoj
skills.description: Search the web simultaneously across multiple search engines like Bing, Yahoo, and Startpage using async-search-scraper. It supports pagination, deduplication, proxy usage, and outputs results in JSON, CSV, or text formats.
skills.descriptionZh: 使用 async-search-scraper 同时在多个搜索引擎（如 Bing、Yahoo、Startpage 等）上进行网络搜索。支持翻页、结果去重、代理设置，并可输出 JSON、CSV 或文本格式。

skills.name: rpi-plan
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Creates a comprehensive implementation plan including PM, UX, and engineering specs after a research phase gives a GO verdict. Generates documents with user stories, UI flows, architecture, and a phased task roadmap.
skills.descriptionZh: 在研究阶段得出可行结论后，创建包含产品、用户体验和工程规范的全面实施计划。生成包含用户故事、UI流程、架构和分阶段任务路线图的文档。

skills.name: wechat-article-search
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Extracts full text and images from WeChat public account article URLs and saves them as clean Markdown files. Bypasses WeChat's bot detection by automatically finding mirror sites.
skills.descriptionZh: 提取微信公众号文章的正文和图片，并将其保存为干净的Markdown文件。通过自动查找镜像站点来绕过微信的反爬虫检测。

skills.name: wechat-article-writer
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Provides full-process support for WeChat Official Accounts and self-media creation, including article writing, cover and illustration generation, and style extraction. It supports multiple writing styles such as viral, checklist, and personal essay, covering data search, title generation, and layout optimization.
skills.descriptionZh: 提供公众号和自媒体创作的全流程支持，包括文章撰写、封面与插图生成以及写作风格提取。支持爆款、清单体、深度随笔等多种写作风格，并涵盖资料搜索、标题生成与排版优化。

skills.name: wechat-db
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: WeChat database query and group message summarization tool, supporting group message queries, daily digests for important groups, full-database keyword search, and multi-account management.
skills.descriptionZh: 微信数据库查询与群消息智能总结工具，支持群消息查询、重要群简报生成、全库关键词搜索及多账号管理。

skills.name: wechat-decrypt
skills.author: ylytdeng
skills.description: A Windows-only tool to decrypt and query WeChat (v4.0) databases. It extracts encryption keys from the running process, decrypts databases, searches messages, and monitors conversations in real-time.
skills.descriptionZh: 在Windows系统上解密和查询微信（v4.0）数据库的工具。支持从运行中的微信进程提取加密密钥、解密数据库、搜索消息以及实时监控对话。

skills.name: wechat-multi
skills.author: joeseesun
skills.description: A macOS WeChat multi-instance tool that enables running multiple WeChat apps by copying the application, modifying the Bundle ID, and resigning it. It supports opening multiple instances, rebuilding after updates, and killing all instances.
skills.descriptionZh: macOS 微信多开工具（小绿书），通过复制应用、修改 Bundle ID 和重新签名来实现多实例运行。支持双开、多开、更新后重建及关闭所有微信实例。

skills.name: wechat-reader
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Reads and extracts the full text of WeChat public account articles. It uses browser automation to bypass anti-scraping measures and render JavaScript content.
skills.descriptionZh: 读取并提取微信公众号文章的完整文本内容。该技能使用浏览器自动化技术来解决常规抓取工具无法获取动态渲染内容的问题。

skills.name: trends24
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: Fetch and summarize real-time global and country-specific Twitter/X trending topics from Trends24. Supports categorizing hashtags and keywords for various regions.
skills.descriptionZh: 从 Trends24 获取全球及各国的 Twitter/X 实时热门话题和趋势。支持按国家/地区查询，并对热门标签和关键词进行分类汇总。

skills.name: wechat-report
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: Generates beautiful HTML visualization reports from WeChat group chat data using templates. It supports dynamic population of charts, topic sections, and to-do lists, with built-in long image download functionality.
skills.descriptionZh: 将提取的微信群聊数据通过HTML模板生成美观的可视化报告页面。支持动态填充统计图表、话题板块及待办事项，并内置长图下载功能。

skills.name: wecom-db
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: A tool for querying WeCom local databases and summarizing group messages. Since local database decryption is unfeasible, it uses the WeCom API to fetch messages and generate AI summaries.
skills.descriptionZh: 用于企业微信本地数据库查询与群消息总结的工具。由于本地数据库解密不可行，目前采用企业微信自建应用API拉取消息并结合AI进行摘要。

skills.name: wechat-sns
skills.author: AI-Fleet
skills.description: WeChat Moments query, analysis, and report generation tool. Supports retrieving posts by time, user, or keyword, and generating visual HTML reports or Markdown exports.
skills.descriptionZh: 微信朋友圈查询、分析与报告生成工具，支持按时间、用户或关键词检索动态，并可生成精美的可视化HTML报告或导出Markdown。

skills.name: weekly-recap
skills.author: AI-Fleet local
skills.description: Generates a weekly recap of all work across projects, summarizing merged PRs, in-progress tasks, infrastructure improvements, and metrics.
skills.descriptionZh: 生成跨项目的每周工作总结，汇总已合并的PR、进行中的任务、基础设施改进及相关指标。

skills.name: wewrite
skills.author: oaker-io
skills.description: A full-workflow assistant for WeChat Official Accounts, supporting hotspot fetching, topic selection, outlining, writing, SEO, AI-trace removal, visual AI, and draft publishing.
skills.descriptionZh: 微信公众号内容全流程助手，支持热点抓取、选题、框架生成、写作、SEO优化、去AI痕迹、视觉AI配图及排版推送草稿箱。

skills.name: x-tweet-fetcher
skills.author: ythx-101
skills.description: Fetch tweets, replies, and user timelines from X/Twitter without login or API keys. It also supports scraping Chinese platforms and includes a zero-cost Google search feature.
skills.descriptionZh: 无需登录或API Key即可抓取X/Twitter的推文、回复和用户时间线。同时支持微博、B站等中文平台数据抓取，并包含免API Key的谷歌搜索功能。

skills.name: xiaohongshu-automation
skills.author: white0dew
skills.description: Automate Xiaohongshu account management via CDP, supporting auto-publishing of images and videos, multi-account management, content search, commenting, and analytics export.
skills.descriptionZh: 通过CDP自动化管理小红书账号，支持自动发布图文和视频、多账号管理、内容搜索、评论发布及数据导出。

skills.name: yt-search-download
skills.author: joeseesun
skills.description: Integrates YouTube Data API v3 and yt-dlp to provide keyword search, channel browsing, and video details. Supports downloading YouTube videos, extracting audio, and fetching subtitles with timestamps.
skills.descriptionZh: 结合 YouTube Data API v3 和 yt-dlp，提供全站关键词搜索、频道浏览与视频详情查看功能。支持下载 YouTube 视频、提取音频以及获取带时间戳的字幕文件。
